name: City Builder
short_description: You're a government worker who is building a city one building at a time. Place parts of your building to build the tallest building ever created in this fun filled endless stacker!
detailed_description:
City Builder

In this 2.5D precision builder, you are playing as a government sanctioned worker who needs to build the biggest building every created. You will attempt to create the building to the best of your ability, see how far you can go before your building topples!

Gameplay:
-Precision Builder in a 2.5D Setting
-Endless Building stacking capabilities
-The Higher the building, the more you can create

Features:
-Over 10 Different structures to build
-Endless Buildings to test your Precision and Endurance
-Achievements
